metadata.description: OMP plugins published by marapapman for test workflow support, including frontend browser evidence, property/API plans, coverage gap analysis, mutation survivor analysis, and omp_test_* tools.

plugins.name: omp-testing-enhancer
plugins.description: Help OMP agents write and check tests with target analysis, public API context, propertyPlan, apiPlan, omp_test_browser_check frontend browser evidence, coverage and mutation report analyzers, quality gates, reports, the /omp-testing-enhancer:test marketplace command, and the omp_test_analyze, omp_test_context, omp_test_browser_check, omp_test_coverage_analyze, omp_test_mutation_context, omp_test_gate, and omp_test_report tools.
